---
title: "MA Search Costs"
author: "Ian McCarthy"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    number-sections: true
    fontsize: 12pt
    geometry: margin=1in
    latex-engine: xelatex
    cite-method: natbib
bibliography: BibTeX_Library.bib
biblio-style: aer
---

# Introduction

# Background

# Data

# Empirical Strategy

# Results

# Discussion

# Conclusion

\bibliographystyle{aer}
\bibliography{BibTeX_Library}
